videos.title: HTML Quotations - Web Dev Simplified
videos.description: Learn how to use HTML quotation and citation elements including q, blockquote, cite, and abbr elements.

videos.title: HTML Crash Course - Quotations & Citations
videos.description: Brad Traversy covers HTML quotation elements, citations, abbreviations, and address elements.

videos.title: Semantic HTML: Quotes and Citations - Kevin Powell
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains the importance of semantic quotation and citation elements for web accessibility.

videos.title: HTML Abbreviations and Acronyms
videos.description: A guide to using the HTML abbr element with title attributes for accessibility and SEO.

videos.title: HTML Address Element - Contact Information
videos.description: Learn how to properly mark up contact information using the HTML address element.
